# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  host: '*'
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: ''
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - external-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  locations:
    - namespace: default
      peers:
        - service: external-service
          port: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd-external.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: istiod
spec:
  hosts:
    - istiod.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 15012
      name: grpc
      protocol: GRPC

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: kiali
spec:
  hosts:
    - kiali.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 20001
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: ''
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces: ['*']
        - action: ALLOW

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  hosts:
    - linkerd-external.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: istiod
spec:
  hosts:
    - istiod.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 15012
      name: grpc
      protocol: GRPC

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: linkerd-external
spec:
  host: linkerd-external.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: policy.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: ''
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - external-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
